Title: ANI - Sophos Firewall Firmware Update - SFOS 22.0.0 GA-Build411
Notes:
Ticket Heading:

ANI- Sophos Firewall Firmware Update - SFOS 22.0.0 GA-Build411

Ticket Summary:

Description:
The Sophos Firewall (SFOS 21.5.1 MR-1) is currently running on build 261. The latest available firmware version SFOS 22.0.0 GA-Build411 needs to be downloaded and applied to update the firewall system.

Action Required:

  1. Verify the latest firmware version is available.

  2. Download SFOS 22.0.0 GA-Build411.

  3. Apply the firmware update and monitor the system for any issues during the installation process.

  4. Ensure backup is taken before proceeding with the update

Title: Whitelist IP
Notes: Whitelist of IP address for Paychex did open sophos and checked for the IP rules that are need to be added for the paychex and found out that there is no active firewall rule so they can work normally.
